footer.tagline: Search, compare and book verified doctors, medical labs and radiology centers across Egypt. Instant confirmation, transparent pricing, and cashback on every visit.
footer.copyright: © {year} {site}. A demo healthcare booking platform — not a real medical service.

authPanel.headline: Healthcare in Egypt, booked in under a minute.
authPanel.subhead: Compare 100+ verified doctors, labs and radiology centers across 10 governorates — then book the slot that actually fits your day.

instant.title: Instant confirmation
instant.body: Pick a slot and it's yours — no phone calls, no waiting for a callback.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.body: See the consultation fee, test price or scan cost before you book.

verified.title: Verified providers
verified.body: Every doctor, lab and radiology center is licence-checked before listing.

notFound.title: This page doesn't exist
notFound.description: The page you're looking for may have been moved, or the provider you followed is no longer listed on {site}.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: We hit an unexpected error while loading this page. Trying again usually fixes it.
